name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature, editor, or UX improvement

labels: enhancement

## What you want
<!-- One or two sentences describing the feature. -->

## Why
<!-- What problem does it solve? What workflow does it unblock? -->

## What the UI might look like
<!-- Optional — a sketch, mockup, or description of how it'd appear in-app. -->

## Related prior art
<!-- Optional — does another tool (NetRadiant, BEHAVED, etc.) do this well? -->

## Alternatives you considered
<!-- Optional — is there an existing workflow that almost works? -->
